name: ACS Jakarta

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Bantar Jati, Kelurahan Setu, Cipayung, Jakarta Timur 13880, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Parents say ACS Jakarta is a well-regarded option for families who want the structure and discipline of a Singapore-style education.
paragraphs: Parents say ACS Jakarta is a well-regarded option for families who want the structure and discipline of a Singapore-style education.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$15K – US$20K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: 8-hectare East Jakarta campus, Classrooms, 400-seat theatre, Sports hall, Two swimming pools.
